event.summary: Reviewed the bounded proposal and made it claimable without expanding its repositories, paths, or prerequisites.

acceptance.proof: Official-shaped finite Endian-Performance values admit while non-finite, nonpositive, malformed, oversized, reordered, and identity-damaged requests reject within existing bounds.
Outlet emits and inlet consumes exactly the observed two initialization records before one caller sample; damaged marker/timestamp/value/order/truncation rejects typed.
Both pinned-official IPv4-loopback directions complete and preserve the explicit caller timestamp and Float32 value bits, or retain an exact sanitized remaining failure without overclaim.
No official source, other format/chunk, multicast/non-loopback, automatic recovery, device, unsafe/FFI, or Manifold authority is added.

document.commit_policy: Commit the bounded request-admission and initialization-sequence correction with synthetic regressions and sanitized rerun evidence coherently before Standard validation; keep lifecycle and push commits intentional.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the bounded request and initialization correction with exact exclusions.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Run focused, owner, official rerun, privacy, and workflow gates.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Describe the corrected one-format compatibility surface without broad claims.
Document request role admission and initialization ownership/order.
Bind the correction to X failure stages and rerun outcomes.
Bind new private driver/raw hashes without raw publication.
Route structural request, initialization damage, cleanup, and official rerun tests.
Review clean-room/public-private routing; no shared mutation expected.
Review data-plane ownership and closed activation; no shared mutation expected.

non_scope: Official implementation source, copied or translated source, general HTTP/header parser, arbitrary request policy, additional sample formats/channels/chunks, discovery responder product surface, multicast/interface selection, non-loopback reachability, performance, or ecosystem-wide compatibility.
Clock changes, queue/recovery changes, async runtime, dependencies, unsafe, FFI, devices, private raw artifacts, or adapters.
Manifold admission, registry, session, route, topology, lease, authorization, replay, or audit authority.
document.objective: Correct the accepted one-record Float32 vertical slice using only LSLC-002X/002S/002T black-box evidence: admit the official request's bounded finite Endian-Performance value while retaining every other fixed/identity role, and exchange/validate the exact observed two-record post-handshake initialization sequence before the caller sample, then rerun both pinned-official IPv4-loopback directions.
outputs: Bounded structural request admission retaining exact start/fixed/identity roles and accepting only one finite positive printable-ASCII Endian-Performance number within the existing header bound.
Exact two-record initialization exchange using the observed marker, finite timestamp bits, and Float32 4.0 then 2.0 value bits before the caller record; malformed initialization rejects typed.
Two-direction pinned-official loopback rerun with only sanitized exact-bit outcomes and private raw provenance hashes.
